title: lacinaria spicata
intro: Lacinaria spicata, also known as the sea holly, is a type of flowering plant in the sunflower family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lacinaria spicata include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and acting as an expectorant to relieve congestion. The plant is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be used topically as a poultice or salve to promote healing and reduce pain.
